topStories.title: Middle East conflict: Iran uses Spanish PM's ‘illegal and inhuman war' remark on missiles targeting Israel | Watch
topStories.description: In the conflict between the US, Israel and Iran, Spanish PM Pedro Sanchez's remarks have now garnered attention. The Iranian military used Sanchez's anti-war remarks and slapped them on missiles targeting Israel.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen: ‘Big won’t beat small anymore, it will be…'
topStories.description: Today, we're diving into the wisdom of a leader who has shaped the digital world we live in. Shantanu Narayen, the CEO of Adobe, is known for his strategic vision and his commitment to creativity and innovation. His words often inspire us to think bigger and act bolder.

dailyNews.title: Wall Street Set For Deep Red Opening? US Futures Follow Global Slump Amid Iran War Jitters
dailyNews.description: S&P 500 futures as of 3:47 p.m. were down 0.80% at $6,508.50, while Nasdaq 100 futures fell 0.76% to $23,916.50, reflecting growing nervousness among investors amid geopolitical uncertainty.

dailyNews.title: US, Israel-Iran conflict: PM Modi says in Lok Sabha security of Indians ‘biggest priority’ —Top 10 quotes
dailyNews.description: PM Modi addressed Lok Sabha, expressing concern over the West Asia conflict and prioritising the security of Indians.

dailyNews.title: Iran threatens to cut off Gulf with sea mines if southern coast, islands attacked - as US eyes Kharg Island blockade
dailyNews.description: The threat from the Iranian authorities has come after reports that the United States was eyeing Kharg Island blockade to reopen the Strait of Hormuz for all shipping

dailyNews.title: Nothing left in matter: Supreme Court disposes plea by Sonam Wangchuk's wife against his detention
dailyNews.description: A Bench of Justices Aravind Kumar and PB Varale noted that the Centre revoked its order of Mr. Wangchuk's detention on March 14

dailyNews.title: Power Couple of Chaos: How a tycoon and activist built a 'Revolutionary Base' at the House of Singham
dailyNews.description: Neville Roy Singham and Jodie Evans funneled $278 million through network spreading pro-China propaganda, according to Fox News Digital investigation.

dailyNews.title: Carly Pearce says faith upbringing in the South came with 'sex shame' and judgement
dailyNews.description: Country star Carly Pearce opens up about faith after her divorce, sharing how her song "Church Girl" became an anthem for those struggling with identity.

dailyNews.title: Las Vegas bets big on March Madness amid city's tourism slump that worries many
dailyNews.description: Las Vegas casinos go all-in on March Madness with massive watch parties as Americans could wager $3.3 billion on NCAA tournaments. The hope is that it will boost tourism.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump, in an all-caps post Monday morning, declared progress toward a "resolution" of the war on Iran in two days of talks.

dailyNews.title: Blue tsunami predictions for November election might not make landfall
dailyNews.description: Foreign policy does matter and Trump's military actions in Iran, Venezuela and Cuba could reshape November midterm elections more than polling suggests.

dailyNews.title: Minneapolis mayor claims Trump can just 'hire out more TSA agents' despite DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey argued that President Donald Trump could hire more TSA agents instead of deploying ICE officers to airports despite the DHS shutdown.

dailyNews.title: If Cuba falls, who steps in? Castro dynasty shadows island’s future
dailyNews.description: As President Donald Trump signals possible action, experts say Cuba has no clear successor while Raúl Castro, 94, remains a significant influence on the communist country.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Iran strategy is working and teaching our foes what deterrence means
dailyNews.description: President Trump's military operations against the Islamic Republic aim to end 47 years of Iranian terrorism and support Iranian people's freedom movement.

dailyNews.title: CHAD WOLF: Trump is serious about the China threat and is rebuilding our arsenal
dailyNews.description: Washington addresses Chinese Communist Party military threat by rebuilding America's industrial capacity to produce critical weapons systems and munitions.

dailyNews.title: Markets Rally as Trump’s Iran Deadline Is Deferred
dailyNews.description: Stock futures rose and oil prices fell after President Trump cited “very good and productive” talks with Iran over ending the war.

dailyNews.title: A Deadly Collision at LaGuardia Airport, and Trump Postpones Strait of Hormuz Deadline
dailyNews.description: Plus, chasing meteorites for money.

dailyNews.title: Suspect in Chicago Student’s Killing Was in U.S. Illegally, D.H.S. Says
dailyNews.description: Sheridan Gorman, 18, was killed last week near Loyola University Chicago. The Trump administration has sought to highlight crimes committed by undocumented people in its deportation campaign.

dailyNews.title: Christopher Columbus Statue Is Installed on White House Grounds
dailyNews.description: The statue of the explorer, a replica of one that protesters toppled in 2020, was placed outside the Eisenhower Executive Office Building.

dailyNews.title: When Voters Worry About ‘Affordability,’ Many Point to Health Care
dailyNews.description: Democrats have had limited political success running on the Affordable Care Act, even with its relative popularity. Now President Trump’s health care cuts may have given the issue new resonance.

dailyNews.title: How Obama’s Strategist Discouraged Biden From Running in 2016
dailyNews.description: In a new set of oral histories, David Plouffe, President Barack Obama’s political adviser, described how he urged Vice President Joseph R. Biden Jr. not to challenge Hillary Clinton for the nomination.
